qa_pairs.question: Which restaurants have a rating that is exactly 3?

SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
WHERE restaurant.rating = 3

qa_pairs.question: What restaurants were visited on or before 2017-10-08 13:00:30 by students who are exactly 20 years old and have an advisor number at least 8772?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
JOIN student ON visits_restaurant.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE visits_restaurant.time <= '2017-10-08 13:00:30' AND student.age = 20 AND student.advisor >= 8772

qa_pairs.question: Which restaurants with a rating of at most 3 have an address containing 3233 St Paul St and are exactly of the Sandwich type?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN type_of_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = type_of_restaurant.resid
JOIN restaurant_type ON type_of_restaurant.restypeid = restaurant_type.restypeid
WHERE restaurant.address LIKE '%3233 St Paul St%' AND restaurant_type.restypename = 'Sandwich' AND restaurant.rating <= 3

qa_pairs.question: Which restaurants named Honeygrow have been visited since 2017-10-08 13:00:30 by students whose major is exactly 550?

JOIN student ON visits_restaurant.stuid = student.stuid

qa_pairs.question: Which Subway restaurants have female students who spent exactly 6.53?

JOIN student ON visits_restaurant.stuid = student.stuid
